characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Meet Caillou! Caillou is a 4-year (3 in some season one episodes) old boy, and the main character and main protagonist of his TV series. His interests include cars and dinosaurs. Adaptational Karma: The reboot actually has a few episodes where he gets punished for acting like a brat. Aerith and Bob: Of course, no one knows why his parents named him after the French word for pebble. Aesop Amnesia: In the earlier episodes, he tends to forget that the world doesn't revolve around him. Attention Whore: Occasionally, but most notably in "Big Brother Caillou", wherein hepinchesRosie just because she got more attention than he did. Although this is nothing in comparison to the books, in which hebither instead.

characters.name: Caillou
characters.description: Meet Caillou! Caillou is a 4-year (3 in some season one episodes) old boy, and the main character and main protagonist of his TV series. His interests include cars and dinosaurs. Adaptational Karma: The reboot actually has a few episodes where he gets punished for acting like a brat. Aerith and Bob: Of course, no one knows why his parents named him after the French word for pebble. Aesop Amnesia: In the earlier episodes, he tends to forget that the world doesn't revolve around him. Attention Whore: Occasionally, but most notably in "Big Brother Caillou", wherein hepinchesRosie just because she got more attention than he did. Although this is nothing in comparison to the books, in which hebither instead.

characters.name: Rosie
characters.description: Meet Caillou’s little sister, Rosie! At 2 years old, Rosie is a giggly little girl who loves to play tricks on her big brother. She also loves playing with Caillou who helps her navigate the big world ahead of her. Adaptational Dye-Job: Was usually blonde in the books. She was probably changed to a red-head as aplay on her name. Adaptational Jerkass: While Rosie was aNice Girlin the original series if not anAnnoying Younger Siblingat times, she comes off as a bit of aSpoiled Bratin Caillou's New Adventures. Annoying Younger Sibling:Depending on the Writer, she'll annoy Caillou to no end. "Rosie Bothers Caillou" is the biggest example. Baby Talk: Earlier episodes depicted Rosie as speaking this way. However, she grows out of it in later episodes.

characters.name: Boris
characters.description: Meet Caillou’s Dad, Boris! Caillou loves to help his dad fix things around the house or have fun at the park. Caillou can always count on his dad to be goofy while learning important life lessons. Beware the Nice Ones: "Caillou Joins The Circus" is one of the few times we see Boris get visibly angry. Couple Theme Naming: His wife's name, Doris,rhymes with his. Good Parents: To Caillou and Rosie. Happily Married: To Doris.

characters.name: Doris
characters.description: Meet Caillou’s Mom, Doris! Although some know her in the workplace as Doris, she’s known as Mommy in Caillou’s household. Caillou loves to help his Mommy with grocery shopping and running errands – they even love to bake and do arts and crafts together! Badass Adorable: Implied as in high school she wasthe captain of her ringette team. Couple Theme Naming: Her husband's name, Boris,rhymes with hers. Eek, a Mouse!!: A variation. She fears hamsters. Good Parents: She's a loving and kind mother.

characters.name: Rexy
characters.description: A Lizard Named "Liz": He's a Tyrannosaurus Rex and he's called Rexy. Keet: Rexy is always full of energy. Leeroy Jenkins: He never looks before he leaps. Suddenly Voiced: In the puppet segments. Vegetarian Carnivore: “Dinosaurs love vegetables! Well, this one does at least.”

characters.name: Teddy
characters.description: A Lizard Named "Liz": He's a Teddy Bear, and he's called Teddy. Beary Friendly: A kind-hearted and mild-mannered Teddy Bear. Cool Old Guy: He's older than Rexy and Gilbert but he's still nice and fun-loving. Deadpan Snarker: Whenever Rexy goes overboard when they’re pretending. Nice Guy: He’s as cuddly as Teddy Bears come.

characters.name: Gilbert
characters.description: Cats Are Snarkers: He's an affectionate cat, but is also the most sarcastic of the trio. Cute Kitten: Not an actual kitten, but is still cute nonetheless. Nice Guy: Loving, affectionate. Suddenly Voiced: In the puppet segments.

characters.name: Grandma
characters.description: Meet Caillou’s Grandma! Grandma loves to garden and spend time outdoors! She is always showing Caillou creative ways to overcome challenges but especially loves painting & gardening with her favorite grandson! Cool Old Lady: She's an affable grandma. Does Not Like Spam: She doesn't like Beetroot. Happily Married: To Grandpa. Nice Girl: Amiable and nice.

characters.name: Grandpa
characters.description: Meet Caillou’s Grandpa! Grandpa always takes Caillou on fun adventures – like fishing, riding the bus through town and camping! He is Caillou’s Daddy’s father and loves telling Caillou stories about his dad when he was little. Cool Old Guy: And how! Happily Married: To Grandma Nice Guy: ACool Old Guy. Rail Enthusiast: He likes trains.

characters.name: Mr. Hinkle
characters.description: Chuck Cunningham Syndrome: Disappears after season four and replaced by a new character called Mrs. Howard. Cool Old Guy: Pretty fun to be around. Intergenerational Friendship: With Caillou. Last-Name Basis: Always referred to as "Mr. Hinkle", but his name is revealed to be Paul in one episode. Nice Guy: Hinkle is a fun guy.

characters.name: Leo
characters.description: Meet Caillou’s Best Friend, Leo! Ever since Caillou met Leo in Day Care, these two mischief makers have been inseparable and always know how to have a good time – whether they are relocating the sandbox by hand or pretending to be dinosaurs! Agony of the Feet: He hurts his foot in "A Friend In Need". The Bully: When he first appears, he bullies Caillou. This is dropped after a quickHeel–Face Turn. Evil Redhead: Only in his debut. Heel–Face Turn: It's easy to forget that he was a bully in his first appearance.

characters.name: Clementine
characters.description: Meet Clementine! A tomboy at heart, Clementine loves exploring the outdoors and especially loves finding insects! Fueled in part by her older brother Billy, Clementine is fearless and often encourages Caillou to take on ever-greater challenges, such as climbing to the top of the big kids slide. Black Bead Eyes: Has these eyes. Nice Girl: She is sometimes a little bossy but overall she is understanding. Only One Name: Her last name is unknown. Outdoorsy Gal: She likes playing outside.

characters.name: Sarah
characters.description: Sarah is six-year-old and knows so many neat things, like what it feels like to lose your front teeth! Confident and capable, Sarah teaches Caillou about the wonders of reading and writing and often shows Caillou things he’s never seen before – like chopsticks and the inside of the big kids’ school! All Asians Know Martial Arts: She practices martial arts. Big Sister Mentor: Can sometimes play this role with Caillou. Cool Big Sis: Towards Caillou. They are not actually related, but she still acts like one. Does Not Like Spam: She doesn't like Bok Choy.

characters.name: Miss Martin
characters.description: Cool Teacher: Pretty well sums her up. Friend to All Children: Which makes sense considering she is a teacher. Last-Name Basis: Called "Miss Martin" by everybody. Nice Girl: Is very kind and patient with her students. Prim and Proper Bun: Miss Martin has a bun.

characters.name: Jason & Jeffrey
characters.description: Innocently Insensitive: One episode had them teasing Xavier, but they revealed that they did not intend to offend him. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: They might cause trouble and once made fun of Xavier, but they're still good people to have around. Palette Swap: Their shirts are striped, but their shirts have inverted color schemes in Seasons 4 and 5. Averted in their early appearances, when they wore identical shirts, leading to many a prank involving aTwin Switch. Took a Level in Kindness: In Season 4, they become more comical instead of mischievous. Took a Level in Jerkass: They were reversed as pranksters again occasionally in Season 5.

characters.name: Xavier
characters.description: Recurring Extra: Hardly makes speaking appearance in episodes and just appears in the background during the classroom scenes.

characters.name: Emma
characters.description: A Day in the Limelight: In Emma's Extra Snacks where it's revealed that she has diabetes. Nice Girl: A caring sort of kid. Only One Name: Like most characters on the show, her last name hasn't been revealed. Race Lift: Despite being Asian-Canadian in the books, she's Caucasian in the cartoon. Recurring Extra: Mostly appears in the background when Caillou is at playschool.

characters.name: Andre
characters.description: The Big Guy: Due to his large size and the fact that he's three years older than Caillou. Gentle Giant: Bigger than Caillou, but very gentle in nature. Lovable Jock: He likes soccer and many other sports. Meaningful Name: He is giant and named after Andre the Giant, who was a real-life gentle giant. Nice Guy: One of Caillou's closest friends.

characters.name: Clementine's Mommy
characters.description: Good Parents: Towards Clementine and Billy. Nice Girl: She's a good mother and very kind to Caillou.

characters.name: Billy
characters.description: Cool Big Bro: Towards Clementine Lovable Jock: He plays baseball. Never Bareheaded: He's always seen wearing something on his head. Nice Guy: Billy is an affable brother. Vague Age: His age hasn't been revealed on the show, but since he is in a marching band, he would be about 12 years old.

characters.name: Julie
characters.description: Chuck Cunningham Syndrome: Julie disappears after Season 3 with no explanation. In Seasons 4 and 5, Grandma and Grandpa take over as Caillou and Rosie's babysitters. Friend to All Children: Given that she's a babysitter. Nice Girl: Julie is an incredibly sweet and friendly babysitter.

characters.name: Robbie
characters.description: Nice Guy: When he befriends Caillou. The Speechless: Due to being deaf, he never speaks. Recurring Extra: He barely appears outside his debut episode.

characters.name: Andy
characters.description: The Bus Came Back: Makes anunexpectedreturn in theNew Adventuresepisode "Caillou and the Fire Alarm". Defrosting Ice King: He acts kinda distant to Caillou at first before they became buddies. No Social Skills: He prefers to be alone. Only One Name: His surname has not been given. Sugar-and-Ice Personality: He is sometimes nice but sometimes not-so-nice.
